name: Solenne Benahavís
description: A hillside new development concept designed around layered terraces, quiet arrival and elevated Mediterranean views.
seoDescription: Solenne Benahavís is a curated hillside new development preview with layered terraces, elevated Mediterranean views and private project material by request.
twitterDescription: Benahavís hillside new development preview with layered terraces and elevated Mediterranean views.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Nueva Living, I would like to speak with an advisor about Solenne Benahavís.

card.label: Benahavís Preview
card.description: A hillside new development concept designed around layered terraces, quiet arrival and elevated Mediterranean views.

hero.alt: Solenne Benahavís hillside new development exterior arrival

architecture.alt: Layered contemporary architecture with terraces and Mediterranean planting
architecture.caption: Layered hillside architecture

privateViewing.alt: Solenne private terrace atmosphere with pool and evening light

copy: Solenne is framed for buyers who want the privacy and elevation of Benahavís without losing access to Marbella, golf and coastal services.
The project language is calm and terrace-led: arrival, views and outdoor living are treated as part of the residential sequence rather than decoration.
metrics: Private PDF and master plan by request

why.copy: Solenne is suited to buyers who want a composed hillside residence with privacy, design clarity and a softer residential pace above the coast.
points: Buyers seeking Benahavís privacy, views and a quieter daily rhythm.
A more layered, arrival-led concept rather than a conventional apartment block.
Benahavís combines privacy, golf access, mountain scenery and proximity to Marbella.
The strongest units depend on orientation, terrace depth and current reservation status.

copy: The architectural direction is hillside-sensitive: horizontal layers, landscaped edges and outdoor rooms designed to soften the transition from built form to landscape.
The result is a residence concept that prioritises shade, privacy, arrival and view composition rather than overstatement.
highlights: Layered terrace planning with generous exterior living space.
Soft Mediterranean landscaping integrated into the arrival sequence.
Panoramic glazing used for light and orientation.
Boutique scale with a private residential feel.

residences.copy: Current unit types, sizes and availability are confirmed through the private project file. The concept is organised around terrace-led living and hillside privacy.

items.name: Garden Residences
features: Private exterior space with direct garden relationship.

items.name: Terrace Apartments
features: Elevated daily living with broad glazing.
Terraces arranged for dining and lounge use.
Strong balance of privacy and convenience.

items.name: Penthouses
features: Large terraces for entertaining and long-stay use.
Selected units may include pool or solarium options.

privateViewing.copy: Experience the atmosphere, arrival and spatial sequence before requesting the full material package.
insights: A calm hillside approach with layered landscape and privacy.
Terraces, horizontal lines and view-led glazing.
Designed for buyers prioritising privacy, wellness and elevation.
Request current material to confirm unit mix and status.

lifestyle.copy: The lifestyle logic is quiet but connected: mountain light, golf access, privacy and a short route back to Marbella services and the coast.
panels: The setting supports a more withdrawn daily rhythm while staying practical for year-round use.
Outdoor space, views and landscape create a natural wellness layer without needing resort-style noise.
Marbella, Puerto Banús and coastal services remain within reach for dining, shopping and schools.

location.copy: Benahavís is valued for privacy, gated communities, golf access and elevated residential settings. It suits buyers who want the Costa del Sol close, but not constantly at the doorstep.

investment.copy: The investment case should be assessed through scarcity, orientation, developer material and Benahavís demand depth. No return is assumed or promised.
cards: Private-release projects can shift quickly as preferred orientations and terrace profiles are reserved.
Direct material helps clarify status, payment structure and actual released inventory.
Privacy, views and outdoor space are durable buyer preferences in the Benahavís market.
The project suits buyers balancing personal use with long-term ownership logic.

trustDossier.copy: Before shortlisting, Nueva Living clarifies developer context, reservation status, specification level and unit-by-unit suitability.
cards: Project material is reviewed against current release information before buyer recommendations are made.
Reservation sequence, payment schedule and legal support are clarified before commitment.
Expected delivery and warranty information are treated as verification points.
The project is assessed against your lifestyle brief rather than treated as a generic listing.

items: Receive brochure, master plan and current availability context.
Compare unit types, orientation, terrace depth and buyer fit.
Arrange a guided preview once preferred options are identified.
Review reservation terms and developer documentation before proceeding.

projectFile.copy: The project file is shared privately so pricing, availability and technical information remain current.

availability.copy: Current availability, reservation status and pricing should be confirmed from the latest developer material before any viewing step.

enquiry.copy: Request current availability, floorplans or a private viewing. We will respond with the relevant project file and advisory context.
enquiry.message: I would like to receive the private project file for Solenne Benahavís, including current availability, master plan, floorplans and viewing options.
enquiry.sentMessage: Thank you. Your Solenne request has been noted for private follow-up.
